notes: Entire game works absolutely perfectly with equal or even better performance than the same machine running it with Windows. Only issue is that Shaders only work on the lowest setting, any higher and the game instantly crashes.
title: Blockland

notes: The game for me would not launch. So i simply set the launch options to "dxlevel -80" and the game launched from there, no issues.
title: Blockland

notes: Runs nearly perfectly out of the box, However, Trying to set shaders to anything above minimum causes a crash.

Runs perfectly on max settings, however, shaders must be disabled or put on the "minimum" setting
